name: Szechwan Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Szechuan hot oil, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta until al dente.
2. Dice turkey, bell pepper, and peeled carrots.
3. Drain and slice water chestnuts.
4. Remove stems from cilantro and use leaves only; reserve a few leaves for garnish.
5. Chop green onions.
6. Slice mini corn cobs.
7. Slice snow peas diagonally into thin strips.
8. Toast sesame seeds and reserve 1 tablespoon for garnish.
9. Toss all ingredients together.
10. For the dressing, combine mayonnaise, soy sauce, Szechuan hot oil, sesame oil, Dijon mustard, and garlic in a food processor; blend until well-blended.
11. Add the dressing to the salad and toss.
12. Garnish with toasted sesame seeds and cilantro leaves.
Makes 14 cups.
